mapper.select:
SELECT id, company_name, company_code, qualification, contact_name, contact_phone, service_regions, product_lines, status, overall_score, cooperation_start, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM agent_company
deleted = 0
AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR company_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{query.status}
AND JSON_CONTAINS(service_regions, JSON_QUOTE(#{query.region}))
AND JSON_CONTAINS(product_lines, JSON_QUOTE(#{query.productLine}))
ORDER BY
overall_score
company_name
create_time
ASC
DESC

SELECT id, company_name, company_code, qualification, contact_name, contact_phone, service_regions, product_lines, status, overall_score, cooperation_start, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM agent_company WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, company_name, company_code, qualification, contact_name, contact_phone, service_regions, product_lines, status, overall_score, cooperation_start, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND JSON_CONTAINS(service_regions, JSON_QUOTE(#{region})) ORDER BY overall_score DESC

SELECT id, company_name, company_code, qualification, contact_name, contact_phone, service_regions, product_lines, status, overall_score, cooperation_start, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND overall_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY overall_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT AVG( (IFNULL(score_timeliness, 0) * 0.30) + (IFNULL(score_quality, 0) * 0.30) + (IFNULL(score_communication, 0) * 0.20) + (IFNULL(score_issue, 0) * 0.20) ) FROM agent_score_log WHERE agent_company_id = #{companyId} AND deleted = 0
